installation_requirements.installation_type: Surface mount (installe en surface) - no above-ground posts, columns, or scissors

specifications.platform_support_tubing: (2) 4 x 8 x 0.250 inch ASTM A-500 Grade B structural steel tubing
specifications.lift_arm_connection_plates: A-36 steel, 1 inch thick (2 per arm)
specifications.base_cross_tubes: (2) 3 x 4 x 5/16 inch structural steel tubes

features: Surface mount parallelogram lift - no above-ground posts, columns, or scissors acceptable
Two platforms raised by hydraulic system with electro-hydraulic control console
Retracted height 13 inches above floor (surface mount)
10 mechanical safety bar lock positions evenly spaced over lift height
First lock position at minimum 18 inches for comfortable brake/tire work
Automatic wheel stops (chocks) engage when ramps lift above 12 inches
Wheel stops retract automatically when ramps reach floor level
Velocity fuse in each hydraulic cylinder prevents rapid descent on oil loss
PLC-controlled system stops all operations on unsafe condition detection
Programmable height stop for jacks, low ceiling accommodation
LED alphanumeric display for operating conditions and status
Audible alarm during raise and lower operations
PARK button with amber illumination when mechanical bars engaged
Manual pump with manual lowering valves for power loss situations
Low-pressure return filter on hydraulic system

optional_equipment.name: Runway Lighting Kit
optional_equipment.description: 8 fluorescent lamps, 40 watt, double pin cool white, 48 inches long minimum, with protective covers, ANSI/ALI ALCTV and UL-201 certified

optional_equipment.name: RJ-50-P Rolling Jack on Cart (Air/Hydraulic)
optional_equipment.cart_dimensions: approx 12 inch H x 28 inch D x 52 inch L
optional_equipment.cylinder_tube: 4 1/8 inch OD ASTM A-513-5 polished steel
optional_equipment.cylinder_base_plate: 3/8 inch x 6 1/4 inch x 8 inch ASTM A-36
optional_equipment.hydraulic_tubing: 3/8 inch OD stainless steel seamless, 14000 psig min
optional_equipment.hydraulic_hoses: Parker SAE-100R2, 1/4 inch ID, 20000 psig min, 4 assemblies

optional_equipment.name: Safety Ribbon Switch
optional_equipment.description: Three 10-foot sections per ramp, emergency stop on contact, yellow color, 1 inch depression activation, 1 lb pressure activation minimum
optional_equipment.mounting_options: Inside, outside, or both sides of ramps

optional_equipment.name: TD-1000-P Counterbalanced Tire/Wheel Dolly
optional_equipment.overall_dimensions: 82 1/2 inch L x 51 1/2 inch W x 84 1/2 inch H
optional_equipment.wheels: Four 8-inch diameter (2 ball bearing front, 2 swivel rear with brakes)

optional_equipment.name: Oil Drain Basin
optional_equipment.basin_dimensions: 42 inch L x 18 inch W x 8 1/2 inch D
optional_equipment.cover_frame: 2 x 2 x 1/4 inch angle iron ASTM A-36
optional_equipment.cover_grating: 3/4-#9 hot rolled metal grating (retains items > 5/8 inch diameter)
optional_equipment.wheel_material: Chrome AISI C-1045 rods with ASTM A-311 Class B 3/4 inch diameter axles

optional_equipment.name: ST-2000 Scissor Transmission Table
optional_equipment.overall_dimensions: 31 inch W x 56 inch L x 34 1/2 inch H
optional_equipment.pump_type: Air/hydraulic foot pump with graduated descent valve

standard_equipment: Dexron III ATF oil for hydraulic pump and reservoir
ANSI/ALI Lifting It Right Manual (ALI standard # SM01-2)
ANSI/ALI Lifting Point Guide (ALI standard # ALI/LP-guide)
safety_features: Mechanical safety bars with 3:1 minimum safety factor on each lift cylinder
10 lock positions evenly distributed over lift height
Automatic wheel stops (chocks) at front and rear of each ramp
Velocity fuse in each hydraulic cylinder prevents rapid descent
PLC stops operation on unsafe conditions (air pressure, ribbon switch, height difference)
LED alphanumeric display for safe/unsafe operating conditions
Manual lowering capability on power loss
Cylinders mounted under ramps protected from debris
notes: French language specification document for Mohawk Model 75-30-S surface mount parallelogram lift
Surface mount variant - retracted height is 13 inches above floor (vs flush mount which is floor level)
No above-ground posts, columns, or scissor lifts acceptable
Equipment must be new with all specified installation materials
All dimensions are minimums; tolerances: +/- 0.25 inch under 10 inches, +/- 1.0 inch for 10 inches to 5 feet, +/- 3.0 inch over 5 feet
Hydraulic fittings must conform to JIC or ORB standards
Base plates must be connected to each other to form a unified chassis (individual unconnected base plates not acceptable)
Concrete floor must not require more than 3000 PSI compressive strength
